ignore — the `.gitignore` matcher the holospace-search Text/File search providers
use to honour VS Code's `useIgnoreFiles` (CC-52). A faithful, widely-used
implementation of gitignore-spec pattern matching (anchoring, negation `!`,
directory-only `/`, `**`), so an arbitrary devcontainer's `.gitignore` is
respected exactly.

Imported external artifact, κ-pinned (Law L5 at the import boundary): the
extension re-derives the bundle to its sha256 before it runs (see
holospace-search/extension.js `IGNORE_PIN`), and the V&V suite checks SHA256SUMS.

  version:  ignore@5.3.1  (npm; https://github.com/kaelzhang/node-ignore)
  license:  MIT

File (the package's single self-contained CommonJS entry, no dependencies):

  index.cjs   the matcher  (npm: ignore/index.js — `.cjs` so Node treats it as
              CommonJS under the web dir's "type": "module", and the browser
              loads it by fetch + evaluate)

Reproduce:
  npm pack ignore@5.3.1     # or: npm install ignore@5.3.1
  cp node_modules/ignore/index.js   index.cjs
  sha256sum index.cjs               # must match SHA256SUMS
